title: Increase the character count on formula columns
excerpt: There is currently a 10K character limit on formula columns. I am using the formula column to automate some information using an if/then statement. Right now, if I hit the 10K limit I have to create a second formula colu…

posts.author: shelbys (Shelby Strohla)
posts.cookedHtml: There is currently a 10K character limit on formula columns. I am using the formula column to automate some information using an if/then statement. Right now, if I hit the 10K limit I have to create a second formula column to reference off of which is not a great user experience.

posts.author: luca (Luca)
posts.cookedHtml: I have the same issue. Trying to setup SLA’s for the Service Hub and can’t because of the character limit restriction
